overview: Buildify is a construction-themed website featuring bold, industry-relevant visuals with a dedicated Portfolio page showcasing completed projects in a fully responsive, creative gallery layout.
features: Dedicated Portfolio page at /portfolio with full project gallery
View All Projects button on home page routes to Portfolio page
Responsive project grid: 4 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile
Creative project cards with images, categories, titles, descriptions
Construction-themed design with teal, slate, and neutral color palette
All pages fully responsive across all devices
